build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/Affiliate/vidown-app && unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run build
test_command: N/A - no tests specified for this project
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to confirm the project compiles without errors. 2. Check that dist/ directory is created with index.html and JS/CSS bundles.
setup_instructions: 1. Create vidown-app directory. 2. Initialize with npm create vite@latest (React template). 3. Install tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, lucide-react. 4. Configure tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js, vite.config.js.
environment_constraints: Must run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS' before any npm/node commands due to a proxy-bootstrap.js preload module issue in the sandbox. Node v22.22.3, npm 11.4.2 available.
key_patterns: Standard Vite+React project structure: index.html at root, src/main.jsx entry, src/App.jsx main component, src/index.css with Tailwind directives.
directory_structure: vidown-app/ - Vite project root with index.html, config files, and src/ containing main.jsx, App.jsx, index.css
